name: Robot Warriors
short_description: Slash and shoot everyone in your way in this hack and slash game. Kill a lot of enemies and find a way to the exit to complete missions.
detailed_description:
In this Hack and Slash game, kill all enemies that appear in your way to complete your mission, don't have mercy, because no one will pardon you.

Control the sword master or the elite trooper and fight through your way with many enemies.

Defeat all enemies or find the exit to complete the mission, this will not be easy.

Avoid being hit, because you can't support much damage, game over for you if you don't evade enemy shoots or run from swords attacks.

Go now and fight your way to the victory.
